**Checklist**

- [ ] `make check` passes (lint + tests)
- [ ] New flags align with [MANIFEST.md](MANIFEST.md)
- [ ] Exit codes unchanged (or documented as breaking)
- [ ] `--dry-run` still works correctly
- [ ] If adding a bundled prompt: passes the evaluation checklist in [ADVANCED.md](ADVANCED.md)
- [ ] If changing a design decision: MANIFEST.md updated in this PR
